BonkDAO Hit by Malicious Governance Attack, ~$20M BONK Drained from Treasury
> BonkDAO suffered a ~$20M governance exploit involving malicious proposals, with investigations underway and exchanges and law enforcement engaged to trace and recover funds.
Source:
https://x.com/bonk_inu/status/2074191403781906800

tweet.text:
BonkDAO was the target of a malicious governance proposal resulting in an estimated $20M worth of BONK tokens being drained from the BonkDAO treasury.

During the investigation, BonkDAO identified the exchange wallets used to purchase BONK ahead of the proposal. BonkDAO is currently actively working with exchanges, bridges and Solana Foundation to best manage the situation.

Law enforcement has been notified. BonkDAO continues to work with relevant parties to recover funds and identify those responsible.

Trader Loses $2M Swapping 1,126 ETH for $14,000 Worth of LIT Due to Low Liquidity Pool
> Trader withdrew $2M of ETH from Binance, then swapped it all to LIT. He received $14.1K of LIT.
> He lost 99% of his funds because the 0x router sent his order through a low liquidity AVAIL pool.
> Titan Builder’s MEV bot backran his trade and profited $2M.
Source:
https://x.com/arkham/status/2074151766829002907

tweet.text:
HE SWAPPED $2 MILLION OF ETH FOR LIT - AND LOST IT ALL

Trader 0xfF8 withdrew $2M of ETH from Binance, then swapped his entire stack to LIT. He received $14.1K of LIT. 

He lost 99% of his funds because the 0x router sent his order through a low liquidity AVAIL pool. Titan Builder’s MEV bot backran his trade and profited $2M.

recent_posts.text:
The State of the AI Economy Report
> The GenAI economy has generated $110B in sales over the past 12 months. On an annualized basis, the revenue run rate exceeds $175 billion.
> AI is scaling faster than the previous IT waves, ~3x more rapidly than the mobile or Internet waves.
> $1B revenue went from taking 180 days in 2023 to under 2 days today, ~90x faster
> This report suggests that AI demand is more revenue-validated than any prior platform shift.
> The investment case comes down to whether falling prices can move enough token volume to earn a return on CapEx.
👇
Full report:
https://www.exponentialview.co/p/the-state-of-the-ai-economy
Source:
https://x.com/azeem/status/2070113886884552755?s=20

tweet.text:
The GenAI economy has generated $110 billion in sales over the past 12 months. It is growing fast. On an annualized basis, the revenue run rate exceeds $175 billion.

These numbers took us several months to construct, and as far as we know, it’s the first bottom-up, deduplicated measure of consumer and enterprise AI spending across the full stack.

We are releasing this research today in our first The State of the AI Economy report.

https://intelligence.exponentialview.co/

DefiLlama Introduces Risk Scenario Planning Tool
> DefiLlama has launched risk scenario planning for Morpho vaults, mapping protocol dependencies and estimating users' maximum losses across potential failure points. Live now across 20 Morpho vaults.
👉
https://defillama.com/yields/pool/e0672197-9f3e-4414-bca5-e6b4c90aa469/risk
Source:
https://x.com/DefiLlama/status/2072796184725373108?s=20

tweet.text:
When you deposit into a vault, you're exposed to more than the vault itself: oracles, bridges, collateral, the sequencer, holders of vault roles.

Introducing risk scenario planning on DefiLlama.

* Maps every dependency that touches your deposit
* Models your max loss from each failure point
* Live now across 20 Morpho vaults

DefiLlama's Risk Scenario Planning tool
Maps every external dependency your deposit in a DeFi vault is exposed to (oracles, bridges, collateral tokens, sequencers, and role holders) and models the maximum potential loss from each failure point
It is currently live for 20 Morpho vaults, with interactive dashboards showing realistic loss scenarios, exit timelines, oracle exposure, smart contract risks
https://x.com/DefiLlama/status/2072796184725373108?s=20

tweet.text:
When you deposit into a vault, you're exposed to more than the vault itself: oracles, bridges, collateral, the sequencer, holders of vault roles.

Introducing risk scenario planning on DefiLlama.

* Maps every dependency that touches your deposit
* Models your max loss from each failure point
* Live now across 20 Morpho vaults

TeraWulf Signs 20-Year Lease with Anthropic at Justified Data Campus in Hawesville, Kentucky
TeraWulf has announced two strategic transactions that advance its AI infrastructure strategy:
> A 20-year lease agreement with Anthropic at its Justified Data campus in Hawesville, Kentucky, expected to generate ~$19 billion of contracted revenue over the initial lease term.
> The sale of its 50.1% stake in the Abernathy Joint Venture to an investor group led by Fluidstack.
Source:
https://investors.terawulf.com/news-events/press-releases/detail/142/terawulf-announces-anthropic-lease-at-justified-data-campus-and-sale-of-majority-interest-in-abernathy-joint-venture-to-fluidstack
